name: DmDmMbrshDmMbrAplDelete

text.value: DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.MBRSH_DM_MBR_APL WHERE ((APL_CUR_STTUS_NM = 'CLOSED' OR APL_CUR_STTUS_NM = 'VOID') AND APL_END_DT < '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDt_Minus30}') OR (APL_CRT_DT < '@{pipeline().parameters.TwoYrsAgo}')

Description:
DESCRIPTION:  Delete appeals with status Closed or Void that are over 30 days old, based on End Date.  Also, 
     delete appeals with any status 2 years after Create Date.

Annotations:
Job Name: DmDmMbrshDmMbrAplDelete

This job deletes appeals from the DataMart table.
Pass through
Drop appeals with status of Closed or Void after 30 days.  Delete all others statuses 2 years after create date.
